name: Video WebM Compressor
description: Batch convert uploaded videos to WebM using VP9, Opus, 600px width, and capped 30fps.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:17777 http://localhost:17777;
